corpus.requirement: we need authentication for admin users — either session-based or JWT would work for our use case
add SSO to the admin panel; consider OIDC or SAML depending on integration effort
migrate from Flyway to Liquibase or consider keeping Flyway and moving to v10 instead
we want to introduce event sourcing for orders — could use EventStore or append-only Postgres
expose the reporting module: REST/GraphQL both have team support, optimize for speed-to-ship
build a public feed API — consider WebSockets or SSE for realtime updates and polling fallback
front-end state is scattered — either Redux or Zustand could unify it, pick one that keeps bundle small
server-state hydration needs alignment: React Query or SWR with optimistic updates for the dashboard
design the checkout flow — could do a modal or a full-page wizard for mobile-first users
either server-render the landing page for SEO or ship an SPA with hydration — pick simplest to maintain
add user search to settings page
fix bug where avatar upload fails on Safari
